notes: Virtual MD v1.2.3 — new DMG installer. First-time users should download Virtual-MD.dmg and drag Virtual MD.app into the Applications folder as shown. Existing installations can ignore the DMG and use the in-app updater (or download the .zip). Also: pad is now optional on the device setup screen — pick 'no pad' if you don't have a trigger device and use the C-B row to set the key.
